positive: A vibrant, minimalist depiction of a mythical forest scene. The central element is a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna (mushrooms, exotic leaves, gentle spirits) forming an intricate, harmonious silhouette against a deep twilight sky. Use a highly stylized, graphic aesthetic inspired by Art Deco natural patterns and Japanese woodblock prints. The color palette must feature jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted sharply with negative space (deep black/midnight blue). Composition should be perfectly centered and scalable, suitable for repeating textile patterns or a single, impactful apparel print. Emphasize clean outlines, high contrast, and strong, elegant negative space.
negative: blur, grainy, low detail, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifact, noisy, ugly, poor anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, low resolution
